name: Marketing-to-Sales Handoff Scorer — Zapier Native Blueprint
summary: Enriches marketing-qualified leads at the moment of handoff by checking Backstory for existing engagement history. Native-first Zapier blueprint that favors published custom apps, native app steps, and structured AI outputs over API Request, Webhooks, and Code-heavy builds.

official_references.label: Custom actions and API requests actions

native_connectors_required: Published Backstory custom Zapier app with explicit search and create actions
Native Salesforce, HubSpot, or Dynamics app triggers and actions
Slack app actions for channel posts and direct messages
Microsoft Teams app actions or companion Microsoft 365 app steps
Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, or Email by Zapier actions
Meeting-system native app or published custom Zapier app for transcript retrieval
Zapier Tables or Storage for state, routing maps, and dedupe keys
prohibited_patterns: Do not use raw API Requests or Custom Actions as the long-term production answer when a reusable custom Zapier app can be published
Do not use Webhooks, Code, Looping, Formatter, or Paths as the basis for a reusable published Zap template
Do not send unvalidated LLM text straight to Slack, Teams, email, calendar, or project-management actions
Do not hide routing or canonical data mapping inside opaque code when Tables, native apps, or custom-app actions can own it
template_constraints: Public Zap templates have product restrictions, so multi-surface workflows may need a blueprint bundle instead of one monolithic reusable Zap.
Use private or published custom Zapier apps for durable source-system integrations instead of repeated API Request steps.

trigger_model.source: Webhook — New MQL created in CRM/MAP                 |
trigger_model.recommended_surface: Native CRM app trigger or private custom Zapier app trigger

apps: Slack app actions for channel posts and direct messages
Microsoft Teams app actions or companion Microsoft 365 app steps
Gmail, Microsoft Outlook, or Email by Zapier actions

blueprint_bundle.trigger: Native CRM app trigger or private custom Zapier app trigger
native_steps: AI step backed by a native LLM app returning strict JSON for Enrich with Backstory History
AI step backed by a native LLM app returning strict JSON for AI Handoff Scoring
Native delivery step: Slack app action for Deliver to SDR/AE
blueprint_bundle.notes: Keep the primary Zap focused on normalization, source access, and structured synthesis. Route secondary fan-out through additional native Zaps when template restrictions or retry requirements demand decomposition.

blueprint_bundle.trigger: Zapier Tables state change, Interfaces action, or an upstream custom app event
native_steps: Read delivery_payload and target metadata from structured fields
Slack app action: Send Channel Message or Send Direct Message
Microsoft Teams app action or Microsoft 365 companion action
Gmail, Outlook, or Email by Zapier action
blueprint_bundle.notes: Use this secondary Zap when you need reusable delivery fan-out, fallback paths, or approval boundaries without falling back to Webhooks or Code steps.

enrich_with_backstory_history.intent: Queries Backstory for any existing engagement with the MQL's account: past meetings, email history, known contacts, prior opportunities.

ai_handoff_scoring.intent: AI Agent evaluates the engagement history to score the handoff (hot / warm / cold) and generates a context brief with key talking points and relationship history.

deployment_notes: If Backstory is not already available as a Zapier integration, publish a private or public custom Zapier app before rolling this out broadly.
Use Zapier Tables or Storage for canonical keys, approval state, dedupe, and retry tracking.
Keep transport deterministic and reserve AI for classification, synthesis, and explanation.
